ksa_text: Skill in designing and implementing data serialization and messaging systems for inter-service communication, including selecting appropriate formats and protocols for reliable data exchange in distributed systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: skill maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("serialization", "inter.service"). STRM composite score is minimal (0.0000 — likely framework vocabulary mismatch, not irrelevance); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External check: no matches in DE job postings or cert curricula (AWS DE, Databricks, dbt, GCP DE). Would a working Data Engineer self-report this as required?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Challenge answered: the technical practice is implicit in DE work (domain affinity 0.82, 2 DE signal(s)). Framework vocabulary matching underrepresents many legitimate DE competencies.
